objective: Prepare a Builder self-build pack that creates the standard agent_programs input format for future external-agent production and records remediation_intake_operator_agent_v1 as the first example program.
scope: create agent_programs README, schema, templates, and first example program only at Builder runtime
copy validate_agent_program_input_format_v1.ps1 into validators only at Builder runtime
validate the new program format against the existing agent catalog and accepted remediation intake operator agent
write AGENT_PROGRAM_INPUT_FORMAT_V1 proof and report only after validation evidence
complete PHASE70 task and capability only after validation evidence
validation: PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE70 APPLY.ps1
PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE70 validator payload
generated_agents and agent_catalog files are not changed during preparation
forbidden_scope: do not create a second agent
do not change GitHub workflow files
do not modify old proof/report files
do not commit or push during preparation
do not run PHASE70 runtime during preparation
